title: Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks – Governance) Amendment Directions, 2026
description: <cite index="36-15,36-16,36-17">The Reserve Bank of India issued the Rural Co-operative Banks – Governance Amendment Directions, 2026, which came into force with immediate effect and modified the Rural Co-operative Banks – Governance Directions, 2025.</cite> The amendments relate to governance and constitution of board provisions for rural cooperative banks.
